summary: Frontend testing completed for PDF generation fix and weight input behavior. All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: App loads correctly with tour list, driver selection, plads buttons
PDF Generation: 'Generer PDF' button successfully generates and downloads PDF without JavaScript errors
PDF generation shows 'PDF genereret!' success toast
No 'autoTable is not a function' error in browser console
No console errors during initial load or PDF generation
Weight Input: No API calls triggered during typing (tested '123' keystroke by keystroke)
Weight Input: API call triggered only on Enter key press
Weight Input: API call triggered only on input blur (focus lost)
Tour list displays correctly with weight inputs for each tour
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation code at line 1481-1597 is clean and properly handles the summary-only format as requested
Weight input handlers at lines 76-96 correctly use local state (useState) and only submit on Enter/blur
jsPDF import at line 5 is clean - no jspdf-autotable import needed since no table is generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: All PDF and weight input fixes verified working. PDF now generates summary-only format (header, driver info, stats, footer - no detailed tour table). Weight inputs use local state and only trigger API on Enter or blur, not on every keystroke.
